data.body: PAUSED ALL (operator request). E6 eval halted at Exp-B 26/42 (Exp-A complete 150/150; resumable). R2 plan-rewrite subagent stopped before applying (b080 still the stub). No active background work. E6 spend so far ~$525 (measured 147.5M in/1.8M out over 430 agentic calls; ~30-40% waste from SIGKILL re-processing + duplicate runs). Awaiting operator decision on how to proceed given the eval-run cost (~$3-5K to complete the full eval-dependent path) + the unexplained ~1.5h SIGKILL cycle. Cheap unblocked path if resumed: R2 (deterministic DET lint, ~$0 eval), R4 (~10 short probe runs), E5 (deterministic replay), epic-close AC reconciliation.
